import { createInertiaApp } from '@inertiajs/vue3'; import createServer from '@inertiajs/vue3/server'; import { renderToString } from '@vue/server-renderer'; import { resolvePageComponent } from 'laravel-vite-plugin/inertia-helpers'; import { createSSRApp, h } from 'vue'; import { ZiggyVue } from '../../vendor/tightenco/ziggy'; const appName = import.meta.env.VITE_APP_NAME || 'Laravel'; createServer((page) => createInertiaApp({ page, render: renderToString, title: (title) => `${title} - ${appName}`, resolve: (name) => resolvePageComponent( `./Pages/${name}.vue`, import.meta.glob('./Pages/**/*.vue'), ), setup({ App, props, plugin }) { return createSSRApp({ render: () => h(App, props) }) .use(plugin) .use(ZiggyVue, { ...page.props.ziggy, location: new URL(page.props.ziggy.location), }); }, }), );
